question: Un households ke geography IDs list karo jahan completion status 'Located' hai, specifically un geography IDs ke liye jinka household split numbers ka count zero se zyada hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) > 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
WHERE household_status_id IN (
    SELECT household_status_id
    FROM dim_household_status
    WHERE completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
)
AND household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY geography_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
raw_output:
SELECT geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
WHERE household_status_id IN (
    SELECT household_status_id
    FROM dim_household_status
    WHERE completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
)
AND household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY geography_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: False). Gold count: 2452. Pred count: 824.

question: Rajasthan state ke liye, state code, household IDs ka total count, aur average household split number list karo, aur ise state code ke hisaab se group karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID), AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE_CODE = 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE;
predicted_sql: SELECT state_code, COUNT(household_id) AS total_households, AVG(household_split_number) AS avg_split_number FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY state_code;
raw_output: SELECT state_code, COUNT(household_id) AS total_households, AVG(household_split_number) AS avg_split_number FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY state_code;

question: Un households ke geography IDs list karo jahan completion status 'Located' hai aur household split number 1 ke barabar hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1;
raw_output:
SELECT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1;

question: Un households ke distinct geography IDs list karo jahan ya toh household split number 1 ho ya completion status 'Located' ho.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 OR T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located';
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE fhc.household_split_number = 1 OR dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE fhc.household_split_number = 1 OR dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';

predicted_sql:
SELECT dgh.state_code, COUNT(fhc.household_id) AS total_household_count, AVG(fhc.household_split_number) AS avg_household_split_number

raw_output:

SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code

question: 'Rajasthan' state ke households ke liye geography hierarchy se PSU codes list karo jahan completion status 'Located' ho, inhein PSU code ke hisaab se group karo taaki household split numbers ka total sum exactly zero ho, aur results ko PSU code ke ascending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.STATE_CODE = 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY T1.PSU_CODE HAVING SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) = 0 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
  AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
  AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: Har sex code ke liye, sex code list karo aur individuals ki average age calculate karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_CODE, AVG(T2.AGE) FROM DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID GROUP BY T1.SEX_CODE
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_demographic_codes.sex_code, AVG(fact_person_core.age) AS average_age
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY dim_demographic_codes.sex_code;
raw_output:

FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY dim_demographic_codes.sex_code;

question: Un household IDs ki list nikaalo jahan har member ki age kam se kam 46 years ho, aur specifically un households ko filter karo jinme kisi bhi individual ka marital status code 'Married' nahi hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE T1.AGE >= 46 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T2.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;

FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1 AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out';

JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id

WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1 AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out';

GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

question: Un saare households ke household ID, household number, aur district code list karo jahan new household split number zero nahi hai aur kam se kam ek household status ID recorded hai, aur result ko household ID ke ascending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
FROM fact_household_core
INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
FROM fact_household_core
INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: Person core records se wo household IDs list karo jahan individuals ki age 22 ya usse zyada hai, lekin specifically un household IDs ko exclude kar dena jisme kam se kam ek person ka marital status code 'Married' ho, aur results ko household ID ke hisaab se order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE ON FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID = FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE FACT_PERSON_CORE.AGE >= 22 AND FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID NOT IN (SELECT FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES ON FACT_PERSON_CORE.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married') ORDER BY FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
FROM fact_person_core
WHERE fact_person_core.age >= 22
AND fact_person_core.household_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
    FROM fact_person_core
    JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
    WHERE dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'married'
)
ORDER BY fact_person_core.household_id;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
FROM fact_person_core
WHERE fact_person_core.age >= 22
AND fact_person_core.household_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
    FROM fact_person_core
    JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
    WHERE dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'married'
)
ORDER BY fact_person_core.household_id;

question: Har ek person ID aur household split number ke liye, maximum age aur household split number find karo, unhe filter karte hue jahan maximum age 13 se zyada ho, aur top 10 results ko maximum age ke descending order mein sort karke list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(T2.AGE), T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.PERSON_ID HAVING MAX(T2.AGE) > 13 ORDER BY MAX(T2.AGE) DESC LIMIT 10;
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number, MAX(fact_person_core.age) AS max_age
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id
GROUP BY fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number
HAVING MAX(fact_person_core.age) > 13
ORDER BY max_age DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number, MAX(fact_person_core.age) AS max_age
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id
GROUP BY fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number
HAVING MAX(fact_person_core.age) > 13
ORDER BY max_age DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Un households ke liye unique PSU codes ascending order mein list karo jahan completion status 'Located' hai, household split number 0 hai, aur new household split number 1 hai.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 0 AND T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
  AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
  AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: Har district ke liye district codes aur household split numbers ka count dikhao, sirf un households ko consider karte hue jinka completion status 'Located' hai, aur highest counts wale top 5 districts display karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dgh.district_code, COUNT(fhc.household_split_number) AS household_split_count
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dgh.district_code
ORDER BY household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dgh.district_code, COUNT(fhc.household_split_number) AS household_split_count
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dgh.district_code
ORDER BY household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: Har district ka district code aur total household IDs ka count dikhao, un households ke liye jahan new household split number zero se zyada ho, aur highest household counts wale top 10 districts display karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(DISTINCT fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_household_ids
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_ids DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(DISTINCT fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_household_ids
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_ids DESC
LIMIT 10;
